documentation.text:
@title Reward Manager Contract
        Receive and manage protocol fees.
        Stake OSHI to receive sOSHI (lock weight) and gain protocol fees.
        stake 3 months: 1x, 6 months: 2x, 9 months: 3x, 12 months: 4x
        The lock weight will not decay.
@notice Override the _authorizeUpgrade function inherited from UUPSUpgradeable contract

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "RewardManager: Amount must be greater than 0"

arguments.value: RewardManager: Amount must be greater than 0

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "RewardManager: Amount must be greater than 0"
